ham:
Dear Customer,

This is an update regarding your broadband service. Our engineer, Mr. R. Kumar, will be visiting your premises on **Wednesday, 19th April 2026** between **10:00 AM and 12:30 PM** to perform routine maintenance and to upgrade your router firmware.

If you have any concerns or need to reschedule, please reply to this message or call our support line at 1800-123-456.

Thank you for choosing our services.

Best regards,
Broadband Support Team
